scripts:
create group reviewers with path /home/groups/mysite
set properties on authorizable(reviewers)/profile
  set givenName{String} to "Article Reviewers"
end

create group journalists with path /home/groups/mysite
set properties on authorizable(journalists)/profile
  set givenName{String} to "Journalists"
end

set ACL for reviewers
    allow jcr:read,rep:write on /content/mysite
end

set ACL for journalists
    allow jcr:read,rep:write on /content/mysite
end
